name: Editorial Content
appropriateWhen: Reading, understanding, comparison, or narrative progression is the primary job.
inappropriateWhen: Users continuously monitor dense changing data or perform repetitive high-frequency actions.
mobileStrategy: Preserve reading measure, source context, and progress; move secondary navigation out of the text column.
signatureMovePatterns: Use the real content hierarchy, citations, chronology, or media treatment as the signature.
forbiddenDefaults: decorative pull quotes without content value
validationRules: Long content does not collapse navigation
